# <feature-name>

## Summary
- What is changing and why.

## Affected Files
- Path + reason for each file.

## API Contracts
- Request/response changes, function signatures, schema deltas.

## Business Logic
- Ordered rules and behaviors.

## Edge Cases
- Invalid input, empty states, retries/timeouts, concurrency.

## Test Scenarios
- Positive, negative, boundary, regression scenarios.

## Non-Goals
- Explicitly out-of-scope items.
